title: Bootloader Node Registry
description: Deployment registry mapping device_id to board type and optional STM32 UID.

device_id.description: Unique per bus; used for RESP_BASE+id and STATUS_BASE+id.

bus.description: Optional CAN bus the node sits on (e.g. FDCAN1/FDCAN2). On a multi-FDCAN gateway, child nodes name their child bus; validate_registry.py --recv BUS=FILE cross-checks that each node's RESP/STATUS filter (BL_RECV_ENTRIES_CHILD) exists in that bus's recv-entries file.

uid.description: Optional 96-bit STM32 unique device ID as 24 hex characters.
